mapper.update: UPDATE research_task SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{taskId}

UPDATE research_task SET status = 'RUNNING', attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, heartbeat_at = #{now}, lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{taskId} AND attempt_count < 3 AND status IN ('CREATED', 'RETRYING') AND (lease_until IS NULL OR lease_until < #{now} OR lease_owner = #{leaseOwner})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, thread_id, status, stage, attempt_count, request_payload, last_error, heartbeat_at, lease_owner, lease_until, updated_at FROM research_task WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND id = #{taskId}

SELECT id, owner_id, thread_id, status, stage, attempt_count, request_payload, last_error, heartbeat_at, lease_owner, lease_until, updated_at FROM research_task WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND search_mode LIKE 'stock-%' AND COALESCE(heartbeat_at, updated_at) < #{heartbeatBefore} ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
